transition_phrases: <break time="300ms"/>I'm just going to listen for a bit. <break time="250ms"/>Take your time.
<break time="250ms"/>Sounds like you need to get this out. <break time="200ms"/>I'm here.
<break time="300ms"/>I'm just here to listen right now. <break time="250ms"/>No agenda.
<break time="250ms"/>Okay, you want my honest take? <break time="200ms"/>Here it is.
<break time="200ms"/>Let me share what I think. <break time="150ms"/>Take what's useful.
<break time="250ms"/>Let's explore this together. <break time="200ms"/>No conclusions yet.
<break time="200ms"/>I have more questions than answers. <break time="150ms"/>Let's dig in.
<break time="250ms"/>What if we just... think out loud for a bit?
<break time="300ms"/>Can I wonder something out loud with you?
<break time="250ms"/>There's something I'm curious about. <break time="200ms"/>Mind if I ask?
<break time="300ms"/>I have a question sitting with me. <break time="200ms"/>It might be a hard one.
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Wait wait wait. <break time="150ms"/>I need to celebrate this with you.
<break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>This is a win. <break time="200ms"/>Can we just sit with that for a second?
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Oh! <break time="100ms"/>This is the good stuff. Tell me more.

smooth_transitions: <break time="200ms"/>Let me put on a different hat here...
<break time="250ms"/>Now I'm going to move from listening to suggesting...
checking_in: <break time="250ms"/>What do you need from me right now? <break time="200ms"/>Listening or input?
<break time="200ms"/>Am I in the right mode? <break time="150ms"/>Tell me what's helpful.
<break time="250ms"/>Do you want me to just listen? <break time="200ms"/>Or would advice help?
